refs.description: Reference disjoint-set implementation with union by rank and path-related logic in the well-known algorithms collection.
Java Union-Find with path compression and union by size, accompanying a widely used algorithms course repo.
NetworkX ships a UnionFind utility class used internally by graph algorithms such as Kruskal's MST and connected-component routines.
SciPy's sparse-graph minimum_spanning_tree uses a disjoint-set / union-find structure inside Kruskal's algorithm.
